productDisplayName: Nike Unisex Rodger Federer Blue Grey White Cap
description: CompositionNavy blue cap made of 58% polyester and 42% cotton fabric with embroidered eyelets on the panels, velcro fastening at the back with embroidered name on the back and embroidered initials on the frontFittingComfortWash careMachine wash in cold water or hand wash separatelyDo not use softenersDo not bleachCool ironTumble dry on lowDo not iron on designDo not dry cleanGet ready to cheer the legendary Roger Federer with this Legacy 91 performance cap from nike. With the Federer name and initials embroidered on it, this cap oozes tennis spirit. Wear it with your sporting clothes or casual wear when you go out in the sun to keep yourself dry and comfortable.
